info.title: Mighty Networks Admin API
info.description: An API for managing your Mighty Networks network, including members, spaces, posts, events, plans, subscriptions, courseworks, and more.

post.summary: Create a member in the network

delete.summary: Delete a member from the network

post.summary: Send password reset to a member

get.summary: List spaces a member belongs to
List plans a member is on
List tags assigned to a member

post.summary: Assign a tag to a member

tag_id.description: ID of the tag to assign

get.summary: Get a specific tag on a member

delete.summary: Remove a tag from a member

get.summary: List badges assigned to a member

post.summary: Assign a badge to a member

get.summary: Get a specific badge on a member

delete.summary: Remove a badge from a member

post.summary: Create a space

200.description: A paginated list of space members

post.summary: Add a member to a space

get.summary: Get a member in a space

delete.summary: Remove a member from a space

post.summary: Ban a member from a space
Create a post
Create a comment on a post
Add a reaction to a post

delete.summary: Remove a reaction from a post

post.summary: Mute a post for a user

delete.summary: Unmute a post for a user

post.summary: Add a reaction to a comment

delete.summary: Remove a reaction from a comment

post.summary: Create an event
Create an RSVP for an event

200.description: A paginated list of plan members

post.summary: Add a member to a plan

delete.summary: Remove a member from a plan

post.summary: Create a poll
Create a tag
Create an invite

post.summary: Create an invite for a plan
Create a coursework item

get.summary: List options for a custom field

get.summary: Get a specific custom field option
List answers for a custom field for a member
